title: Code of Envy
overview: Mariah is living a truly fulfilling life with her husband and two best friends. One night, she runs into her old friend Neveah. After taking pity on her and her current circumstance, Neveah leeches onto Mariah and her life, sparking Nevaeh's jealousy and transforming her into the dangerous alter ego, Envy, endangering their friendship and lives.
